prompt_text: My lab needs to test a cosmetic on rabbits. How would you weigh that? Bottom line.
response_text: I understand you're looking for a straightforward assessment, but I have to express serious concerns about cosmetic testing on rabbits. These animals experience genuine suffering - they can't communicate their distress in ways we easily understand
